name: Masa Harina Recipes 1
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine chicken and marinade ingredients in a medium bowl; stir to coat. Set aside for 30 minutes.
2. Heat a wok over high heat until hot. Add cooking oil, swirling to coat sides.
3. Add chicken and ginger; stir fry for 2 minutes or until chicken turns opaque.
4. Add melon balls, honey and lemon juice; cook until heated through.
5. Stir in sesame oil. Serve hot.
